{{Infobox group
| name = Fallen Leaf
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The disciples of the [[Fallen Leaf]] are described as honorable.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fallen Leaf]] is represented by a young woman in purple robes with a crown of ivy.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Fallen Leaf]] is a school that young geniuses from clans might attend.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
